task_objective: Professional Nail Art Line Art Generation & High-Precision Image Editing

structural_reference.description: High-precision preservation of nail structural framework, including exact shape, contour, length, width, and edge details

aesthetic_reference.description: Extract aesthetic elements, including color system, pattern texture, and overall style tone for nail art

workflow.step_1_structural_analysis: Parse structural elements from Figure 1 with strict precision, including nail shape, contour lines, proportional relationships, and edge details.
workflow.step_2_aesthetic_extraction: Extract color palette, pattern texture, and overall style elements from Figure 2, to be applied exclusively to the nail structure from Figure 1.
workflow.step_3_composite_generation: Professional nail art photography, no text, front standard view, high-definition details. Precisely apply the aesthetic elements from Figure 2 onto the nail structure from Figure 1. The aesthetic elements must fit naturally with the nail structure with seamless integration, no visible artifacts, and physically accurate material properties. Configure four distinct design variations in a 2x2 grid. Each variation must clearly reveal the nail art's overall design and fine details (color application, pattern continuity, texture quality). Preserve the complete structural integrity from Figure 1 — nail shape and contour remain untouched. Guarantee consistent structural framework across all variations.

final_execution: Generate 4 high-quality nail art images based on the 4 design variations and present them in a 2x2 Four-panel Grid.
